evals.name: list-my-tasks
evals.prompt: Show me all my tasks in Huly that are due this week
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly tasks --assignee me` or `huly report weekly --assignee me` and returns a list of tasks with due dates

evals.name: overdue-tasks
evals.prompt: What tasks are overdue? I need to see which ones I'm late on
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly tasks --overdue --assignee me` and returns overdue tasks with days late

evals.name: create-task
evals.prompt: Create a new task in project DELTA titled 'Test API connection' with medium priority, due tomorrow
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly create task "Test API connection" --project DELTA --priority MEDIUM --due tomorrow` and confirms creation with task ID

evals.name: task-details
evals.prompt: Show me details for task DELTA-1
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly task DELTA-1` and returns full details: title, status, priority, assignee, due date, project

evals.name: daily-report
evals.prompt: Give me a daily report of my tasks
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly report daily --assignee me` and returns: due today, overdue, in progress counts

evals.name: update-task-status
evals.prompt: Mark task DELTA-42 as done and add a comment saying it's been tested
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly update task DELTA-42 --status Done --add-comment "Tested"` and confirms changes

evals.name: list-projects
evals.prompt: What projects do we have in Huly?
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly projects` and returns list of projects with identifiers and names

evals.name: delete-task
evals.prompt: Delete task DELTA-99
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly delete task DELTA-99 --yes` and confirms deletion

evals.name: whoami
evals.prompt: Am I connected to Huly? Show me my account info
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly whoami` and returns host, workspace, account email

evals.name: json-mode
evals.prompt: Get my tasks in JSON format
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly tasks --assignee me --json` and returns structured JSON with status and data fields

evals.name: create-label
evals.prompt: Create a label called 'critical' in Huly
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly labels create "critical"` and returns the created label with ID

evals.name: assign-label
evals.prompt: Tag task DELTA-42 with the critical label
evals.expected_output: First runs `huly labels list` to find the label ID, then `huly labels assign DELTA-42 <labelId>`

evals.name: show-labels
evals.prompt: What labels are on task DELTA-42?
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly labels show DELTA-42` and returns list of assigned labels

evals.name: list-teamspaces
evals.prompt: Show me all document spaces in Huly
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly docs teamspaces` and returns list of teamspaces with names and IDs

evals.name: list-documents
evals.prompt: What documents are in the Engineering teamspace?
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly docs list "Engineering"` and returns list of documents

evals.name: create-document
evals.prompt:
Create a document called 'Sprint Retro' in the Engineering teamspace with the content '# Sprint Retro

## What went well'
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly docs create "Sprint Retro" -t Engineering --content "# Sprint Retro..."` and confirms creation

evals.name: read-document
evals.prompt: Show me the content of the Sprint Retro document
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly docs read "Engineering" "Sprint Retro"` and returns markdown content

evals.name: list-milestones
evals.prompt: What milestones does the DELTA project have?
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly milestones list --project DELTA` and returns milestones with status and target dates

evals.name: create-milestone
evals.prompt: Create a milestone called 'Beta Release' for project DELTA due April 15
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly milestones create "Beta Release" --project DELTA --target 2026-04-15` and confirms creation

evals.name: complete-milestone
evals.prompt: Mark the Beta Release milestone as completed
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly milestones complete <milestoneId> --project DELTA` and confirms completion

evals.name: create-teamspace
evals.prompt: Create a private teamspace called 'Architecture Docs' with description 'System design documents'
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly docs create-teamspace "Architecture Docs" --description "System design documents" --private` and confirms creation

evals.name: filter-by-project-and-status
evals.prompt: Show me all in-progress tasks in the DELTA project
evals.expected_output: Runs `huly tasks --project DELTA --status "In Progress"` and returns filtered task list
